meta.description: Comprehensive database for RNS Institute of Technology

college.name: RNS Institute of Technology
college.location: R R Nagar Post, Channasandra, Bengaluru - 560098

canteen.location: Near the sports ground and hostel entrance

gym.details: Separate gym facilities and timings for boys and girls

wifi.details: Campus-wide Wi-Fi available for students and staff

banking.details: Canara Bank extension counter and ATM on campus

programs.phd: VTU Research Centers in CSE, ECE, MECH, CIVIL, CHEM, PHYSICS, MATH, MBA

faqs.question: Hello
faqs.answer: Hello! Welcome to RNS Institute of Technology. I am your digital receptionist. How may I assist you today?

faqs.question: Hi
faqs.answer: Hi there! Welcome to RNSIT. How can I help you today?

faqs.question: Hey
faqs.answer: Hey! Welcome to RNS Institute of Technology. What can I help you with?

faqs.question: Good morning
faqs.answer: Good morning! Welcome to RNSIT. How may I assist you today?

faqs.question: Good afternoon
faqs.answer: Good afternoon! Welcome to RNSIT. How may I help you?

faqs.question: Thank you
faqs.answer: You are most welcome! It was my pleasure to assist you. Have a wonderful day at RNSIT!

faqs.question: Thanks
faqs.answer: You are welcome! Feel free to ask if you need anything else. Have a great day!

faqs.question: Bye
faqs.answer: Goodbye! Thank you for visiting RNSIT. Have a wonderful day!

faqs.question: Goodbye
faqs.answer: Goodbye! It was nice helping you. Have a great day at RNSIT!

faqs.question: What can you do
faqs.answer: I can help you with information about RNSIT departments, facilities, staff, admissions, placements, library, hostel, canteen, and much more. Just ask me anything!

faqs.question: Who is the Principal of RNSIT?
faqs.answer: Dr. Ramesh Babu H S is the current Principal of RNSIT. Contact: +91 94489 53800.

faqs.question: Who is the Director of RNSIT?
faqs.answer: Dr. M K Venkatesha is the Director of RNSIT. Contact: +91 98808 67337.

faqs.question: Who is the Chairman of RNSIT?
faqs.answer: Dr. R. N. Shetty is the Group Chairman and founder of RNSIT.

faqs.question: When was RNSIT established?
faqs.answer: RNSIT was established in the year 2001.

faqs.question: Who founded RNSIT?
faqs.answer: Dr. R. N. Shetty, a well-known industrialist and philanthropist, founded RNSIT.

faqs.question: Where is the Accounts Manager office?
faqs.answer: The Accounts office is located in the Administrative Block.

faqs.question: What is the highest placement package offered?
faqs.answer: The highest CTC offered was 56 LPA in 2023. In 2025, it was 50 LPA.

faqs.question: How can I contact the Admissions department?
faqs.answer: Call +91 81472 86667 or email admissions@rnsit.ac.in. The admissions office is open on all Saturdays and Sundays too.

faqs.question: Is there a gym on campus?
faqs.answer: Yes, RNSIT has separate gym facilities and timings for boys and girls.

faqs.question: Where is the canteen located?
faqs.answer: The canteen is located near the sports ground and hostel entrance.

faqs.question: What are the college working hours?
faqs.answer: The college working hours are 9:20 AM to 5:00 PM on all working days.

faqs.question: Does RNSIT have Wi-Fi?
faqs.answer: Yes, RNSIT has campus-wide Wi-Fi available for all students and staff.

faqs.question: Where is the Dr. Shivaram Karanth Auditorium?
faqs.answer: The Dr. Shivaram Karanth Auditorium is located in the Administrative Block with a seating capacity of 1800.

faqs.question: What is the intake for the CSE department?
faqs.answer: The CSE department has an intake of 720 students per year.

faqs.question: Is there an ATM on campus?
faqs.answer: Yes, a Canara Bank extension counter and ATM are available on the RNSIT campus.

faqs.question: Where can I find the Toyota Center of Excellence?
faqs.answer: The Toyota Center of Excellence is located in the Mechanical Engineering department.

faqs.question: What are the library timings?
faqs.answer: The RNSIT Central Library is open from 9:00 AM to 8:00 PM.

faqs.question: Does the college provide transport?
faqs.answer: Yes, RNSIT operates a fleet of buses and a van for students.

faqs.question: Where is the placement cell?
faqs.answer: The placement cell is located on the ground floor of the Admin Block.

faqs.question: How many students can the girls hostel accommodate?
faqs.answer: The girls hostel can accommodate 300 students and offers amenities like Morning Yoga and Meditation sessions.

faqs.question: Is medical help available on campus?
faqs.answer: Yes, first-aid kits and 24/7 ambulance services are available on campus.

faqs.question: What is the COMEDK code for RNSIT?
faqs.answer: The COMEDK code for RNSIT is E104.

faqs.question: What is the CET code for RNSIT?
faqs.answer: The CET code for RNSIT is E118.

faqs.question: How many companies recruit from RNSIT?
faqs.answer: More than 200 companies recruit from RNSIT including Cognizant, Infosys, IBM, HCL, Tata Elxsi and many more.

faqs.question: Does RNSIT have PhD programs?
faqs.answer: Yes, RNSIT has VTU Research Centers in CSE, ECE, Mechanical, Civil, Chemistry, Physics, Math and MBA.

faqs.question: What are the student clubs at RNSIT?
faqs.answer: RNSIT has clubs including QuizCorp, Google DSC, AdroIT, Big O Coding Club, Placement Club and Aura cultural club.

faqs.question: What is the cultural fest of RNSIT?
faqs.answer: The cultural fest of RNSIT is called Aperture.

faqs.question: What departments does RNSIT have?
faqs.answer: RNSIT offers CSE, ECE, ISE, EEE, Mechanical, Civil, AI and ML, CSE Data Science, CSE Cyber Security, AI and DS at UG level, and MBA and MCA at PG level.

faqs.question: Where is RNSIT located?
faqs.answer: RNSIT is located at R R Nagar Post, Channasandra, Bengaluru - 560098.

faqs.question: What is the website of RNSIT?
faqs.answer: The official website of RNSIT is https://www.rnsit.ac.in

faqs.question: What is the affiliation of RNSIT?
faqs.answer: RNSIT is affiliated to Visvesvaraya Technological University (VTU) and is an Autonomous institution.

faqs.question: How many placements in 2025?
faqs.answer: In 2025, RNSIT achieved 1060 placements with a highest CTC of 50 LPA and 426 internships.

faqs.question: Who is the HOD of CSE?
faqs.answer: Dr. Kiran Y.C. is the HOD of the CSE department at RNSIT.

faqs.question: Who is the HOD of AI ML?
faqs.answer: Dr. Andhe Pallavi is the HOD of the AI and ML department at RNSIT.

faqs.question: Where is admin block?
faqs.answer: The Administrative Block houses the Director and Principal offices, Accounts, Admissions, Placement Cell and the Dr. Shivaram Karanth Auditorium.
